title: Paprika Prawns & Garlicky Mashed Beans
summary: Smoky paprika prawns on a bed of creamy garlicky beans. Perfect for meal prep and ready in under 30 mins.

method.description: Zest the lemon and set aside. Thinly slice the chilli and half the garlic. Finely grate the remaining garlic. Pick the parsley leaves and finely slice the soft stalks.
Devein the prawns if you like, then set aside.
Place a saucepan over a medium heat. Pour in the beans with their liquid and add the grated garlic. Bring to the boil for 2-3 mins, then reduce to a low simmer while you cook the prawns.

Heat the olive oil in a frying pan over a medium heat. Once hot, add the parsley stalks, sliced garlic and three-quarters of the chilli. Cook for 1-2 mins until softened, then chuck in the cherry tomatoes. Cook for 5-7 mins, stirring occasionally, until the tomatoes burst.
Add the prawns and smoked paprika to the pan. Stir through and cook for 2-3 mins, until the prawns are cooked through. Season with salt, pepper, lemon zest and lemon juice.

Meanwhile, lightly mash the beans in the saucepan. Stir through the cottage cheese and season to taste with salt, pepper, lemon zest and more juice, if you like. Add a splash of water for a looser consistency.
Spoon the garlicky mashed beans into bowls. Top with the paprika prawns and pan juices. Finish with parsley leaves, the remaining chilli and a wedge of lemon on the side.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
